case_title: DE SOTO CAB COMPANY VS. ROSARIO AYALA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2014 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00) SERVED FEB-10-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, ROSARIO
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE SOTO CAB COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AYALA, ROSARIO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,606.01 FILED BY DE SOTO CAB COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, ROSARIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE SOTO CAB COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-08-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-08-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAITIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
